description_long: This object is a standard Western-style toilet with a rounded bowl and a prominent, rectangular cistern at the back. The toilet seat and lid are made of a wood-textured material, contrasting with the smooth, white ceramic body of the bowl and cistern. A metallic flush lever is visible on the right side of the cistern, indicating a manual flushing mechanism. The base of the toilet is wide and stable, designed to be mounted securely to the floor. The overall design is functional and typical for public or residential restrooms, with no visible accessibility modifications. The surfaces appear hard, smooth, and easy to clean, suitable for high-traffic urban environments.
description: A white ceramic toilet with a wood-textured seat and a rectangular cistern, featuring a visible flush lever and a sturdy floor-mounted base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open wood-textured seat, the white bowl, and the flush lever on the right side of the cistern.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the cistern, the profile of the seat, and the flush lever.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, rectangular back of the cistern with no visible plumbing or features.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the seat profile and the cistern, with the flush lever not visible from this angle.
